productDisplayName: Puma Men Scribble Graphic Black Tshirts
description: Composition Black round neck short sleeved t-shirt made of 100% cotton, that has a softly ribbed neckline with fabric tape detailing on the inseam, brand logo in rubber print below the nape of the neck,\ and graphic print on the front along with an embroidered pattern on the left sleeve Fitting Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash with like colours in cool water at 30 degrees Do not bleach Do not tumble dry Warm iron Do not dry clean Random-ness is a part of life and certain unexpected things leads to much glee. puma pays tribute to the random human spirit with Scribble Graphic t-shirt. Team it with a pair of jeans or shorts and zoom away in style. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6.1', Shoulder-18"
